title: equilabium stenosiphon
intro: Equilabium stenosiphon, also known as the Himalayan snake root, is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Equilabium stenosiphon is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal formulations to support overall well-being.
